mapper.select:
SELECT t.tenant_id AS id, t.tenant_name AS name, t.tenant_code AS tenant_code, t.status AS status, t.created_at AS created_at, t.activated_at AS activated_at, t.representative_name AS representative, t.business_no AS business_number, t.phone_no AS phone, t.email AS email, t.address AS address, t.tenant_type AS company_type, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM seller s WHERE s.tenant_id = t.tenant_id ) AS seller_count, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM account a WHERE a.tenant_id = t.tenant_id ) AS user_count, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT a2.warehouse_id FROM account a2 WHERE a2.tenant_id = t.tenant_id AND a2.warehouse_id IS NOT NULL UNION SELECT DISTINCT sw.warehouse_id FROM seller_warehouse sw WHERE sw.tenant_id = t.tenant_id AND sw.warehouse_id IS NOT NULL ) warehouse_union ) AS warehouse_count FROM tenant t
t.status = #{status}
AND ( t.tenant_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR t.tenant_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR t.representative_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR t.email LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
ORDER BY CASE WHEN (#{sortBy} = 'name' AND (#{sortOrder} = 'asc' OR #{sortOrder} = 'ASC')) THEN t.tenant_name END ASC, CASE WHEN (#{sortBy} = 'status' AND (#{sortOrder} = 'asc' OR #{sortOrder} = 'ASC')) THEN t.status END ASC, CASE WHEN (#{sortBy} = 'tenantCode' AND (#{sortOrder} = 'asc' OR #{sortOrder} = 'ASC')) THEN t.tenant_code END ASC, CASE WHEN (#{sortBy} = 'activatedAt' AND (#{sortOrder} = 'asc' OR #{sortOrder} = 'ASC')) THEN t.activated_at END ASC, CASE WHEN ((#{sortBy} IS NULL OR #{sortBy} = '' OR (#{sortBy} != 'name' AND #{sortBy} != 'status' AND #{sortBy} != 'tenantCode' AND #{sortBy} != 'activatedAt')) AND (#{sortOrder} = 'asc' OR #{sortOrder} = 'ASC')) THEN t.created_at END ASC, CASE WHEN (#{sortBy} = 'name' AND (#{sortOrder} IS NULL OR #{sortOrder} = '' OR #{sortOrder} = 'desc' OR #{sortOrder} = 'DESC')) THEN t.tenant_name END DESC, CASE WHEN (#{sortBy} = 'status' AND (#{sortOrder} IS NULL OR #{sortOrder} = '' OR #{sortOrder} = 'desc' OR #{sortOrder} = 'DESC')) THEN t.status END DESC, CASE WHEN (#{sortBy} = 'tenantCode' AND (#{sortOrder} IS NULL OR #{sortOrder} = '' OR #{sortOrder} = 'desc' OR #{sortOrder} = 'DESC')) THEN t.tenant_code END DESC, CASE WHEN (#{sortBy} = 'activatedAt' AND (#{sortOrder} IS NULL OR #{sortOrder} = '' OR #{sortOrder} = 'desc' OR #{sortOrder} = 'DESC')) THEN t.activated_at END DESC, CASE WHEN ((#{sortBy} IS NULL OR #{sortBy} = '' OR (#{sortBy} != 'name' AND #{sortBy} != 'status' AND #{sortBy} != 'tenantCode' AND #{sortBy} != 'activatedAt')) AND (#{sortOrder} IS NULL OR #{sortOrder} = '' OR #{sortOrder} = 'desc' OR #{sortOrder} = 'DESC')) THEN t.created_at END DESC, t.tenant_id ASC

SELECT t.tenant_id AS id, t.tenant_name AS name, t.tenant_code AS tenant_code, t.status AS status, t.created_at AS created_at, t.activated_at AS activated_at, t.representative_name AS representative, t.business_no AS business_number, t.phone_no AS phone, t.email AS email, t.address AS address, t.tenant_type AS company_type, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM seller s WHERE s.tenant_id = t.tenant_id ) AS seller_count, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM account a WHERE a.tenant_id = t.tenant_id ) AS user_count FROM tenant t WHERE t.tenant_id = #{id}
